prestazioni: SR20DET (black top, 7,000 RPM redline) forced induction upgrade via Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate, paired with Tomei 264°/260° duration, 11.5mm/10.8mm lift camshafts and Tomei M82 Type-R head studs for 1.5-bar boost pressure retention

Nismo 74mm big-bore throttle body with custom 3-inch velocity stack, HKS Super Power Flow Type-R 80mm intercooler core (front-mount, 600x300x76mm), and custom 3-inch aluminum charge piping with HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve for minimized turbo lag and optimized airflow dynamics

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with individual cylinder fuel trims, dual Bosch 028 high-impedance injectors (primary) and ID1000 secondary injectors (staged), Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and Tomei 85mm titanium intake manifold with velocity stacks for optimized mid-to-high RPM torque delivery
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear), extended rocker panels, and integrated rear diffuser for aggressive stance and aerodynamic stability

Seibon Carbon CS-II dry carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts for direct intercooler airflow, paired with a custom carbon fiber front bumper featuring a 3D-printed splitter with adjustable dive planes (30mm extension) for downforce optimization

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +15 (front) and 18x10.5 +22 (rear) wheels with custom 5x114.3 to 4x100 hub conversion, wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40/18 (front) and 275/35/18 (rear) tires, paired with Cusco Type RS coilovers (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear springs) and Cusco front strut bar for chassis rigidity
